betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Dark Fusion Core (DFC)§f

§aThe ultimate reactor — generate GHEs of power per tick! The final step in NTM progression!§f

The §bDark Fusion Core§f (DFC) is the ultimate reactor of the mod, capable of generating many GHEs per tick even in weak configurations. DFC components are forged in the §bPlasma Forge§f and require §bWelded Osmiridium Plates§f.

§6Core Types§f:
The core determines the power multiplier for the entire reactor:
§b• §bVibrant Singularity§f — §e500×§f multiplier
§b• §bTiny Wormhole§f — §e650×§f multiplier
§b• §bEye of Harmony§f — §e800×§f multiplier
§b• §bThingy§f — §e2500×§f multiplier (best)

§6DFC Fuels§f (ranked by energy multiplier):
§b1.§f Antischrabidium — §e2.7×§f
§b2.§f BF Rocket Fuel — §e2.5×§f
§b3.§f Antimatter — §e2.2×§f
§b4.§f Schrabidium Trisulfide — §e2.0×§f
§b5.§f Tritium — §e1.7×§f
§b6.§f Deuterium / Xenon Gas — §e1.5×§f
§b7.§f Poisonous Mud — §e1.4×§f
§b8.§f Liquid Oxygen — §e1.2×§f
§b9.§f Liquid Hydrogen — §e1.0×§f

§6Power Formula§f:
P = (w × 100) × f1 × f2 × c × 95000
Where:
P = HE/s output
w = emitter input energy (0-100%)
f1, f2 = fuel multipliers
c = core type multiplier

§6Setup (compact 3×3 possible)§f:
§b1.§f Place Fuel Injector at core's x,z position
§b2.§f Place Receiver/Tungsten Crate ≤15 blocks away, pointed at core
§b3.§f Place Emitter and Stabilizers at same height
§b4.§f Place Dark Fusion Core directly above injector

§cWarning§f: The core sets nearby entities on fire and deals massive damage. The beam deals §e50 damage§f and destroys most blocks. Never approach the operating DFC without Fau armor!

§eTip§f: Start with a Vibrant Singularity core and basic fuel (Deuterium + Liquid Oxygen). Upgrade to better cores and fuels as you scale up. Multiple emitters can be chained (95% efficiency per chain).
